message:
Add cargo metadata timeout, edge-case tests, and binary hash hardening

cargo_path_deps.rs:
- Add 30-second timeout to `invoke_cargo_metadata` to prevent indefinite
  hangs when cargo metadata stalls (e.g., network fetches, lock contention).
  The implementation spawns a thread to wait on the child process and polls
  with a deadline, returning a MetadataInvocationFailure error on timeout
  so the caller falls back to manifest parsing.
- Add comprehensive unit tests for error type construction, accessors, and
  Display formatting to verify all CargoPathDependencyError builder fields
  (manifest_path, dependency_name, dependency_path, diagnostics, cycle).
- Add tests for internal helpers: default_package_name, resolve_dependency_candidate,
  contains_glob, contains_wildcard, wildcard_match, and cycle_from_stack.
- Add finalize_graph tests covering empty graphs, single-root, unreachable
  package exclusion, cycle detection, and diamond-shaped reachability.
- Add graph and edge serialization round-trip tests.
- Add PartialGraph tests for edge deduplication, package name updates from
  default to real names, and workspace_member flag promotion.
- Add metadata provider tests: fallback on provider error, synthetic JSON
  metadata, and standalone crate with no dependencies.

binary_hash.rs:
- Handle empty marker in binary_contains_marker by returning Ok(true),
  consistent with str::contains("") semantics, preventing unnecessary
  file reads.
- Add edge-case tests: empty file, text file, and truncated ELF header
  all correctly fail binary hash computation.
- Add BinaryHashResult equivalence tests verifying that only code_hash,
  text_section_size, and is_debug are compared (not full_hash).
- Add serialization round-trip, hash determinism, format validation
  (64-char hex BLAKE3), and marker search edge cases (empty/very long).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
